rejected_candidates.title: Former stakers can block emergency exits forever with zero-amount withdrawals
rejected_candidates.reason: Merged into F-001 as a material improvement. It is the same root cause: global `lastWithdrawEpochId` plus zero-amount `withdraw()` calls keeping `emergencyWithdraw()` unavailable; the updated finding now explicitly captures that former stakers with leftover checkpoints can do this without holding any stake.

rejected_candidates.title: Arbitrary-token exits burn full claims even when the user receives fewer tokens
rejected_candidates.reason: Merged into F-008 as a material improvement. The updated finding now covers both zero-payout `false` returns and short-paying fee-on-transfer/deflationary outbound transfers that still burn the user's full recorded claim.
